summary: E-commerce website for 'Sells For You' - a product sales platform with product listings, shopping cart, and Internet Identity authentication for secure checkout
architectural_notes: E-commerce platform with Internet Identity integration
Shopping cart system for order management
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Professional hero banner showing e-commerce/online shopping theme with modern gradient background (hero-banner.dim_1920x600.png)
- Generic product placeholder image with box/package icon on neutral background (product-placeholder-1.dim_400x400.png)
- Generic product placeholder image with different package design on neutral background (product-placeholder-2.dim_400x400.png)
- Generic product placeholder image with another package variant on neutral background (product-placeholder-3.dim_400x400.png)

existing_features.title: Create a product catalog page that displays products with name, description, price, and image
Create shopping cart functionality allowing users to add products, update quantities, and remove items
Integrate Internet Identity authentication for user login and secure checkout
Create a checkout flow that captures order details and stores completed orders
Design a professional, modern visual theme with a cohesive color palette, clean typography, and polished layout that conveys trust and quality for an e-commerce platform
Render generated product placeholder images and hero banner as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated

new_feature_requests.summary: Implement backend storage for products with fields: id, name, description, price, and image filename
